$comment: Expected search results for principal-user-123 searching 'Dashboard'. Only page-003 is returned because permissionAttributes filtering.

$invariants.permission_enforcement: MUST NOT return documents where principalId is not in allowedPrincipals
$invariants.tenant_isolation: MUST NOT return documents from other tenants
$invariants.deterministic_filtering: Same query with same principal always returns same results (given same index state)
